message:
fix: resolve rig-level beads in gt sling via rigs.json prefix fallback

gt sling/hook could not find rig-level beads (bd-, gt-, wy- prefixes)
because getBeadInfo() ran bd --no-daemon from town root, which only sees
the HQ dolt database. Added resolveBeadDir() that:
1. Tries routes.jsonl prefix routing (existing mechanism)
2. Falls back to rigs.json prefix mapping (new fallback)
3. Falls back to town root

Also restored --no-daemon for all bd calls (correct for dolt-native mode)
but now with the right working directory per bead prefix.

Fixes: gt-kbbj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
